name: Smith Ortiz, P.C.
description_short: Chicago-based bankruptcy law firm offering Chapter 7, Chapter 13, and debt relief services with 25+ years of combined attorney experience.
description_long:
Smith Ortiz, P.C. is a Chicago-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in consumer debt relief and bankruptcy filing services. The firm was founded by attorneys with combined experience exceeding 25 years in bankruptcy and debt relief law, with one founder holding both a JD and MBA. They serve individuals and business owners facing financial distress throughout the Chicagoland area.

The firm offers comprehensive bankruptcy services including Chapter 7 liquidation bankruptcy, Chapter 13 repayment plan bankruptcy, credit restoration, debt collection defense, foreclosure defense, repossession defense, and wage garnishment protection. They provide free initial case evaluations to assess client financial situations and recommend appropriate debt relief strategies. Their services are designed to help clients eliminate or restructure unsecured consumer debt and avoid asset loss or wage garnishment.

Smith Ortiz distinguishes itself through individualized client attention, detailed step-by-step case guidance, and competitive pricing. Client testimonials specifically praise their patience, professionalism, and ability to explain complex bankruptcy procedures clearly. The firm's dual legal and business expertise (via the MBA-holding founder) provides broader financial context than typical bankruptcy practices. They emphasize the legitimacy of bankruptcy as a legal financial fresh start rather than shame or failure.

The firm's online presence and marketing are straightforward without aggressive sales tactics. Pricing and fee structures are not detailed on the website, requiring direct consultation. All service descriptions align with legitimate bankruptcy law practice, and no red flags regarding predatory practices appear in available content.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: 25+ years of combined bankruptcy and debt relief experience across multiple attorneys
One founder holds both law degree and MBA, providing business and financial analysis expertise
Free initial consultation and case evaluation to assess options
Offers both Chapter 7 (liquidation) and Chapter 13 (repayment plan) strategies
Client testimonials specifically praise detailed step-by-step explanation of complex processes
Handles multiple related issues: foreclosure defense, repossession, wage garnishment, debt collection
Individualized approach rather than assembly-line processing
cons: No transparent fee structure or pricing information published online
Website content appears incomplete (cuts off mid-sentence in final paragraph)
One client testimonial mentions divorce services, creating confusion about service scope
No information about payment plans, financial assistance, or affordability for low-income clients
Limited detail on success rates, timelines, or outcomes for specific bankruptcy chapters
best_for: Chicago-area individuals facing foreclosure, vehicle repossession, or wage garnishment
Consumers with substantial unsecured debt seeking Chapter 7 discharge or Chapter 13 restructuring
People overwhelmed by collection calls and harassing creditor contact seeking legal relief
Business owners requiring both personal and business debt relief guidance
diagnosis: Smith Ortiz is appropriate for Chicago-area residents seeking legitimate bankruptcy legal representation from experienced attorneys, particularly those facing immediate threats like foreclosure or wage garnishment. The main caveat is that bankruptcy is a complex legal proceeding requiring full transparency about costs and timelines—neither of which are detailed on their website—so direct consultation is essential before committing.
services: Chapter 7 bankruptcy filing and debt liquidation
Chapter 13 bankruptcy filing and 3-5 year repayment plan creation
Free case evaluation and financial situation assessment
Means test qualification analysis for Chapter 7 eligibility
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
